notes: German science and technology leader with the iconic Eusolex® UV filter brand, manufactured to pharmaceutical-grade quality standards. Merck KGaA uniquely combines UV filter expertise with functional and pearlescent pigment technology, offering ingredients that provide both color and UV protection. Their Eusolex® portfolio covers mineral and organic UV filters with EU Annex VI approval, and their effect pigments with UV protection are a distinctive offering for premium color cosmetics.
